subcodes.first_line: O Most Great Ocean! Reveal the pearls that lie hidden within Thee unto him who hath turned towards Thee, that Thou mayest draw him unto the Most Exalted Horizon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بحر الاعظم اظهر اللئالی المکنونه فیک لمن اقبل الیک لتجذبه الی الافق الاعلی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @praise and encouragement
